heading: Changes in boundaries of Executive order reservations
label: 398d Changes in boundaries of Executive order reservations
text: Changes in the boundaries of reservations created by Executive order, proclamation, or otherwise for the use and occupation of Indians shall not be made except by Act of Congress.
notes: Amendments1976— struck out proviso relating to nonapplicability of provisions to temporary withdrawals by Secretary of the Interior.Pub. L. 94–579
